☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Husk wasn’t one to give into false hope. He was a gambler, sure, but that had a lot to do with luck and sometimes skill. Two totally different things. Yeah, sure. Ignoring that, he still didn’t really like to believe rumors. More often than not they ended up being an over-exaggeration or just a complete lie. Alastor was an exemption to the rule, not the standard. There’s a difference.

All things considered he didn’t know why he even bothered listening when some, obviously drunk, rando started rambling about someone who had the ability to sever soul deals. That was impossible, wasn’t it? How would that even work? And what would it cost? It had to be.. a lot. Yet he still listened long enough to get the location of the miracle worker. ❞
creator: AyoIdk
